commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human review is required because contributor-supplied real iOS proof and maintainer product/security approval remain merge blockers; the concrete code fixes alone do not make this automation-safe.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a new credentialed mobile/WebView/provider boundary, and source inspection found unvalidated provider base URLs that can carry secrets.; Review finding: [P1] Use one Theme type... commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a new `mobile/` Swift package and SwiftUI iOS app, mobile CI jobs, docs/assets, and Swift coordinator/islo clients for sandbox-backed LLM chat.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defects: the latest Mobile iOS job log reproduces the duplicate `Theme` compile failure, and source inspection shows raw credential-bearing provider URLs plus ignored islo exec results. This is not a current-main user bug report.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is required because contributor-supplied real iOS proof and maintainer product/security approval remain merge blockers; the concrete code fixes alone do not make this automation-safe.
